zh.lifeSummary: 當Clarice de Tregoz於大約1263年出生在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德時，她的父親John de Tregoz II23歲，母親Mabel FitzWarin17歲。她於1276年9月12日與Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年8月28日在英國格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其享年38歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clarice de Tregoz于大约1263年出生在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德时，她的父亲John de Tregoz II23岁，母亲Mabel FitzWarin17岁。她于1276年9月12日与Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年8月28日在英国格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其享年38岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tregoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from Treago in Crantock (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + uncertain final element.
Altered form of French   Tricot   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. It was reportedly brought to North America from England. Today it is found mainly in PA and OH. Compare   Trago  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Trago
meanings: Variant of   Trego  , a surname of Cornish and French origin. In the US, it is found mainly in PA and OH.

nameMeanings.name: Clarice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval English and French form of the Latin name Claritia. This may have meant ‘fame’ (an abstract derivative of clārus ‘famous’), but as a given name it may have been no more than an arbitrary elaboration of Clara . It was borne by a character who features in some versions of the medieval romances of Roland and the other paladins of Charlemagne, and in recent times by the ceramic artist Clarice Cliff ( 1899–1972 ).

variants.name: Claris
meanings: Medieval English and French form of the Latin name Claritia. This may have meant ‘fame’ (an abstract derivative of clārus ‘famous’), but as a given name it may have been no more than an arbitrary elaboration of Clara . It was borne by a character who features in some versions of the medieval romances of Roland and the other paladins of Charlemagne, and in recent times by the ceramic artist Clarice Cliff ( 1899–1972 ).

variants.name: Clarisse
meanings: Medieval English and French form of the Latin name Claritia. This may have meant ‘fame’ (an abstract derivative of clārus ‘famous’), but as a given name it may have been no more than an arbitrary elaboration of Clara . It was borne by a character who features in some versions of the medieval romances of Roland and the other paladins of Charlemagne, and in recent times by the ceramic artist Clarice Cliff ( 1899–1972 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Clarice de Tregoz was born about 1263, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, her father, John de Tregoz II, was 23 and her mother, Mabel FitzWarin, was 17. She married Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield on 12 September 1276, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 28 August 1300, in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clarice de Tregoz est née environ 1263, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Tregoz II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzWarin, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield le 12 septembre 1276, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1300, à Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clarice de Tregoz um 1263 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Tregoz II 23 und ihre Mutter Mabel FitzWarin 17. Sie hat am 12. September 1276 in England Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. August 1300 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clarice de Tregoz è nata il circa 1263 nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, John de Tregoz II, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Mabel FitzWarin, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield il 12 settembre 1276, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 agosto 1300, nel Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Clarice de Tregozが約1263年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで生まれた時，父John de Tregoz IIは23歳，母Mabel FitzWarinは17歳であった。1276年9月12日にイギリスでRoger la Warre Lord of Isefieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年8月28日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウオットオン ウンダー エッジで38歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウオットオン ウンダー エッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Clarice de Tregoz(이)가 대략 1263년 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Tregoz II(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel FitzWarin(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1276년 9월 12일 영국에서 Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 8월 28일 영국 그루스스터실르 보턴 운더 에지에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 보턴 운더 에지에 묻혔다.

mn.Wickwar, Gloucestershire, England: Wickwar, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clarice de Tregoz nasceu aproximadamente 1263, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Tregoz II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzWarin, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield em 12 de setembro de 1276, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1300, em Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clarice de Tregoz родилась около 1263 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Tregoz II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzWarin, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield 12 сентября 1276 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 августа 1300 г. в местности воттон ундир эдж, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности воттон ундир эдж, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clarice de Tregoz nació aproximadamente 1263, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Tregoz II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mabel FitzWarin, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Roger la Warre Lord of Isefield el 12 de septiembre de 1276, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1300, en Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
